subject: URGENT: take a look at this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT
body:
| | | | The mainstream media and the political class are at it AGAIN!
---
---
| Friend, **The mainstream media and the political class are at it again.** Carly beat their candidates in Iowa, she has more cash on hand, and she's outpolling them in New Hampshire--and **they're doing everything to keep her off the debate stage on Saturday.**

I've forwarded the letter Carly sent to the Republican National Committee below. Make sure you read it, and [**make sure you share this letter on Facebook to help us fight back.**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1SrPRz1cjAFIj5o8TN7i5m)

You've helped get Carly on the debate stage once. With your help, we will make it happen again.

Thanks,

Sarah Isgur Flores
Deputy Campaign Manager
Carly for President
* * *
---
| | | [](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1Ss1nUkhDPwUpfaf1gdx1j)
---
| |
---
| February 3, 2016
Republican National Committee
310 First Street, SE
Washington, DC 20003
To the Chairman and Members of the Republican National Committee, Our debate process is broken. Networks are making up these debate rules as they go along--not to be able to fit candidates on the stage--but arbitrarily to decide which candidates make for the best TV in their opinion. Now it is time for the RNC to act in the best interest of the Party that it represents. In 2012, the debate stage featured 8 candidates until the Iowa Caucus and then all declared candidates still in the race were invited from that point forward, including the ABC New Hampshire debate. As of today, I will be the only candidate kept off the debate stage. To review, we beat Governors Christie and Kasich in Iowa this week when voters actually had their say. This campaign has the same number of delegates as Governors Bush and Kasich while Governor Christie has zero. We're ahead of Dr. Carson in New Hampshire polling. We are 6th in hard dollars raised and have twice the cash on hand as either Governors Christie or Kasich. We are already on the ballot in 32 states, and there is a ground game with paid staff in 12 states. Yet, all of these candidates will be invited to the ABC debate. I will not. There are only 8 candidates left. It's time for the RNC to demand that media executives step aside and let voters hear from all of us. I trust you will act appropriately. Carly Fiorina
| | [ SHARE THIS LETTER ](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1SscUfDmY4o6voWl8JjLXg "SHARE NOW")
---

---
| | |
##### PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT

name: Rick Santorum
subject: I am endorsing Marco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

Thanks for standing with me all of these years.

Your steadfast support and commitment to fighting important conservative battles has meant so much to Karen and me. As you may have heard, I announced tonight that I will be ending my Presidential campaign. While the results were not what we had hoped, the experience of running for President was tremendously gratifying and something I won’t soon forget. And as Karen and I discussed leaving the Presidential race, we also talked about who we should support now that I am stepping aside. There are many qualified, conservative candidates in the race for the White House. But when it comes to the issues that we care about the most – restoring the American dream for hardworking families, standing up for the rights of the unborn, protecting our nation’s security, and fighting for international religious freedom – **we believe Marco Rubio’s position are right on, and he has earned our endorsement.** We have taken a long, close look at all of the candidates. Running for President provides you with a unique look into the candidates’ positions and temperament. ******Marco Rubio is the right Republican to lead our party and our country.** His policies will revive our manufacturing sector, help our families thrive and defeat ISIS. It is time to coalesce around the strongest candidate who will stand up for conservative values, be a statesman on the world stage, and has the ability to win a general election. ******That is Marco Rubio.** Thank you and God Bless America, Rick

[](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final&n=1)

body:
What Bernie said about Team Hillary | Friend --

You've probably heard by now, but let me say it again... WE WON THE IOWA CAUCUS!

Now take that enthusiasm and channel it, because we've got our work cut out for us: Bernie's supporters chipped in $3 million _within 24 hours_ of the caucus. [**That's an incredible show of support, and we need to make sure we're fighting just as hard for Hillary. Can you chip in $1 now to help us close the gap?**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2Mzg5MDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwNzExODM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Bernie says we're not as energetic or enthusiastic as his supporters. It's true that more of his supporters have stepped up to fund his campaign, but I think he's dead wrong (and more than a little insulting) about the strength and character of Team Hillary.

Our team is a kid in St. Louis holding a sign she made: "Ms. Hillary, you are making this little girl's dreams come true." Our team is a 102-year-old grandmother in Iowa who was born seven years before women could vote, and who came out Monday night to help Hillary become the first woman in history to win the Iowa caucus.

This team is the most passionate and dedicated group of supporters in this election -- and we're going to fight for Hillary just as hard as she'll always fight for us. **If you're with her, chip in $1 right now -- it's about more than money. Robby

name: Sarah Steelman
subject: Why I support Eric Greitens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Dear Friend,

In 1984, President Reagan said, "a spirit of renewal is spreading
across this land." Thirty-two years later, I see this same spirit
spreading throughout our state. This can be a place where good
jobs are available to every able-bodied person willing to work,
where businesses can exercise their entrepreneurial talents,
where families can prosper, where the power of the people is more
important than the power of government, and a place we're proud
to call home. We all love Missouri, but we need a new leader in
Jefferson City who will renew its spirit, and bring forth its
opportunity and its excellence. That's why I'm supporting Eric
Greitens for Governor - he is that leader.

Eric understands and cherishes the founding principle that the
people are not beholden to the government, but that government is
beholden to the people. He knows that success depends on greater
freedom rather than bigger government. He knows that a
prosperous economy goes hand in hand with fiscal conservatism.

Eric's background and experience highlight his place as a
conservative outsider. He courageously served four tours of duty
overseas as a Navy SEAL, including Afghanistan and Iraq. When he
returned from Iraq, he witnessed the mistreatment of his friends
and fellow veterans by a broken government agency- the VA. He
founded The Mission Continues, rooted in the conservative
principle that every life has value and a God given purpose. This
nonprofit is now a leading veteran's organization in the country,
having helped thousands of veterans continue their service at
home. Eric demonstrates his love of country by both his actions
and his words.

Eric has never run for political office - he'll never be beholden
to the special interests and lobbyists that currently run
Jefferson City. His bold ideas, enthusiasm, and energy will turn
our state around- and put us on the path to prosperity. Eric
knows what it takes to be a great leader, and he's willing to
roll up his sleeves and work hard.

I have fought for our conservative principles for my entire life.
I am confident that Eric Greitens will fight for these same
values that made this country into the greatest nation in the
world. I ask you to join me in supporting Eric for Governor, and
help make Missouri great again!

In Freedom,

Sarah Steelman

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

name: Ben Carson
subject: With Ted Cruz, it's more politics as usual
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33325984:WYIarQCNo:m:1:876315805:40E51C202470B3F0FDB6EA7E468514DD:r)
---

Peter,

After the dirty political tricks employed on Monday night in Iowa, it's time to take a stand.

Here are the facts -- as the caucuses began, Ted Cruz's campaign deliberately instructed its leaders around the state to spread a false report that I was dropping out. Clearly this was an attempt to bolster their numbers, because no attempts were made to verify the truth.

As a Christian man, I accept the apology he has since offered and I take him at his word that he didn't know. But no actions have been taken to correct the problem. That I cannot accept.

**One thing is now clear -- while Senator Cruz may preach against the "Washington Cartel," he will still adopt, or at least not condemn, Cartel tactics for his own political gain.

**The Obama Era has been filled with examples of wrongdoing with no accountability, and we cannot continue down that road.

The pundits mock me because unlike Senator Cruz, I'm not a politician.

"Why is he even running?" they ask. I'm running to end politics as usual, to bring real accountability and integrity to Washington, and to drown out the manipulative political class with the united voice of "We the People."

**[Please help me fight back right now with an emergency donation of $2 or more.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33325984:WYIarQCNo:m:1:876315805:40E51C202470B3F0FDB6EA7E468514DD:r)
**
When I began this race, I said I would never sacrifice my principles for political correctness. I said I would focus on building up our country rather than tearing down my opponents. I said I would always do what I believed was right. I would rather lose an election than lose my soul.

I've learned that this is not common in politics. That's a shame, but it's never too late to do the right thing. It's time to stand up for honesty, integrity, and the principles that made us great.

We've got an uphill battle before us. It's been difficult and it will continue to be so. But it's a fight worth fighting, because the future of our children and grandchildren is at stake.

**[Peter, I need you standing with me. Please help by making a donation of $2 or more now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33325984:WYIarQCNo:m:1:876315805:40E51C202470B3F0FDB6EA7E468514DD:r)**

Thank you for your dedication to our campaign, we sincerely appreciate it.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson**

We're on a roll! In the last week alone, we've picked up endorsements from both the SEIU _and_ the League of Conservation Voters.

These endorsements aren't just big names though - they represent hundreds of thousands of people who are ready for bold, new leadership in Washington.

Are you one of them? If you're ready for representation that supports workers, values families, protects our environment and grows our economy - then I need you with me right now.

I'm in. I'm in all the way. I'm in for the families I've sat with and the workers I've marched with and for every single person who has ever worked hard and deserved to get ahead.

Thanks for being a part of it, Katie

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Goldman Sachs thinks we are "dangerous"
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters -
The CEO of Goldman Sachs, Lloyd Blankfein, said yesterday our campaign represents a dangerous moment, "not just for Wall Street, but for anyone who is a little bit out of line."
I have to say, I find it a little beyond comprehension that Lloyd Blankfein would lecture our campaign about "dangerous moments" after Wall Street received huge bailouts from the working families of this country, when their greed and recklessness caused millions of Americans to lose their jobs, livelihoods, and homes just a few years ago. His arrogance has no end.
Now Wall Street is pouring money into other campaigns. But I am here to tell you that we don't want their money and we don't want their super PACs. We are going to do it differently. We are going to win together on the strength of millions of small donations.
[**Make a $3 contribution today to say you have had ENOUGH of Lloyd Blankfein and the billionaire class buying up candidates and elections in this country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/when-we-stand-together?refcode=em160204full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/when-we-stand-together?refcode=em160204full")
Here's the truth: Wall Street is terrified because we are running a campaign that does not support their agenda. They never expected us to battle to a virtual draw in Iowa, and they are starting to get a bit nervous about New Hampshire too.
The next primary is less than one week away, and we have a slight lead in the polls despite opposition from the economic and political establishment in the state. But if we stand together, I know that we have a good chance to win next week.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ2NDcyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODQzMjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ2NDcyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODQzMjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ2NDcyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODQzMjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2NDcyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODQzMjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ2NDcyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQwODQzMjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

subject: Win Prizes with Team Trump Super Bowl of Prizes!
body:
Peter --

### Get Out the Vote for Mr. Trump and
# **Win the Super Bowl of Prizes!**
It is Super Bowl Weekend.

That does not mean the GOTV stops.
It is time to step up your game to **win in New Hampshire**!

**Get Out The Vote for Donald Trump and Win Prizes!**
**Wild Card Game
** Friday, February 5th
9AM-9PM
Top Caller wins a $15 Buffalo WILD Wings Gift Card
(or alternate restaurant if you don’t live close to a BW’s)
**Division Champs
** Saturday, February 6th
9AM-9PM
Top Caller wins a $20 Chic-fil-A Gift Card
**League Championship
** Sunday, February 7th
12Noon–6PM
Top Caller wins a $25 Amazon Gift Card
**Super Bowl of Prizes!
** Friday, Feb 5 – Sunday, Feb 7
Top caller of the weekend wins a BOWL filled with SUPER Trump Campaign Swag (Red hat, knit hat, tee-shirt, multi-color bumper sticker), party snacks, and a $30 Shell Gas Gift Card.
**BONUS
** Any Phone Banker who is the #1 caller in the nation on Friday, Saturday, or Sunday will receive a Bonus $5 on their winning card.
This is attainable. **Congratulations to both Ruth Melson of VA-MD and Edward Newland of VA-NoVA who each were the top caller in the nation last week!**
**Rules

** 1\. Email [Dena@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:Dena@DonaldTrump.com) to receive a CallFire invitation and instructions.
2\. You MUST be registered as a Team MidAtlantic caller. This means your CallFire First Name MUST be VA-???? <\- Code for your region – MD, DC, WV, NoVA, SWVA, RVA, or SEVA. See the instructions (sent at the time you received your CallFire invitation) for a complete explanation and directions to change your name to be in compliance.

3\. The CallFire system will compile the number of calls made to determine the winner.
4\. Only calls into **New Hampshire** count toward the prizes.

5\. Both calls from Home and calls from Phone Banks count toward the winning totals. See a complete list of available group Phone Banks at [https://www.facebook.com/vafortrump/events](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvafortrump%2Fevents&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=super_bowl&n=1).
## **
Good Luck! Get Out the Vote!**

Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

---
